title: centaurea atlantica
intro: Centaurea atlantica, also known as the Atlantic knapweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. Centaurea atlantica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its flowers can be used in salads or as a garnish.
